case_title: EUGENE SIMPSON VS. KAHN AND KEVILLE, CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, EUGENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAHN AND KEVILLE, CALIFORNIA CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, EUGENE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN AND KEVILLE, CALIFORNIA CORP.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,681.41 FILED BY SIMPSON, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN AND KEVILLE, CALIFORNIA CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KAHN AND KEVILLE, CALIFORNIA CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM BRINNON---OFFICE MANAGER AND VICTOR GARCIA--SERVICE MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-08-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN AND KEVILLE, CALIFORNIA CORP.
